title: Google Patents Search Scraper
description: Search Google Patents with prior-art, assignee, inventor, country, status, type, sort, and date filters.

q.title: Search Query
q.description: Google Patents search query. Supports patent keywords and Boolean-style patent search text.

num.title: Results Per Page
num.description: Number of patent results to request on the page.

sort.title: Sort Order
sort.description: Leave empty for relevance, or sort by newest or oldest results.

country.title: Country Filter
country.description: Comma-separated patent country codes, such as US,EP,WO.

language.title: Language Filter
language.description: Google Patents language filter, such as ENGLISH, GERMAN, or FRENCH.

status.title: Patent Status
status.description: Filter by granted patents or applications.

type.title: Patent Type
type.description: Filter by utility patents or design patents.

before.title: Before Date Filter
before.description: Filter patents before a filing or publication date. Format: filing:YYYYMMDD or publication:YYYYMMDD.

after.title: After Date Filter
after.description: Filter patents after a filing or publication date. Format: filing:YYYYMMDD or publication:YYYYMMDD.

inventor.title: Inventor Filter
inventor.description: Comma-separated inventor names for people-focused patent searches.

assignee.title: Assignee Filter
assignee.description: Comma-separated assignee or company names for IP monitoring and competitor patent tracking.
